statement.p: Your cell phone company charges a {\$15} monthly fee, plus {\$0.14} per minute of talk time. One month your cell phone bill was {\$64}. How many minutes did you spend talking on the phone that month?
You spent talking on the phone that month.

solution.p: Let x be the number of minutes you talked on the phone that month.
You must pay {\$0.14} per minute of talk time. If you talked x minutes, you would pay 0.14x dollars.
Now we can write an equation:
You spent {350\ {\rm min}} talking on the phone in that month.
